SEARCH

Class Booking

java.lang.Object
Booking
public class Booking extends Object
Represents a booking record linking a User, a Classroom, date and time. OOP Concept: Encapsulation, Association (uses User and Classroom objects)
Version:
1.0
Author:
Student 03306

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Booking

      public Booking(int bookingId, User user, Classroom classroom, String date, String timeSlot)
      Creates a new Booking.
      Parameters:
      bookingId - unique ID
      user - the user making the booking
      classroom - the reserved classroom
      date - the booking date (YYYY-MM-DD)
      timeSlot - the time slot

      Returns:
      booking ID
